_comment: Source of truth for /projects. Generated by scripts/sync-projects.js from zabalgames.com (ZABAL Gamez adoptable-projects.json). Run that script to refresh. type: extend | fork | build. Omit "repo" for concept-stage and add "spec".

projects.name: ZAOOS
projects.desc: The ZAO's monorepo lab and gated Farcaster client - social feed, audio/video spaces, governance, and a large research library. New features prototype here before graduating to their own repos.

projects.name: ZAONEXUS
projects.desc: A searchable directory of 200+ links across The ZAO community and ecosystem, with dark/light mode and live partnership data.

projects.name: ZAO-Leaderboard
projects.desc: Onchain leaderboard ranking ZAO members by Respect holdings (OG Respect + ZOR) on Optimism, with identity from Airtable and join dates via Alchemy.

projects.name: zao-claude-skills
projects.desc: A library of hand-written Claude Code skills for the ZAO ecosystem - meeting capture, research, distribution, and bot ops - with an auto-sync wrapper.

projects.name: ZAOscribe
projects.desc: A Discord bot that joins a voice channel, records per-speaker audio, transcribes it, and extracts action items to a tracked file - then posts a recap.

projects.name: wavewarzapp
projects.desc: A fan spectator and alert app for WaveWarZ Solana music battles - real-time battle view, artist stats, follows, and one-tap trade deep links.

projects.name: songjam-site
projects.desc: The Songjam leaderboard and music-drops frontend - aggregates Farcaster, Space, and timeline contribution points into a live leaderboard.

projects.name: zpoidh
projects.desc: The BetterCallZaal POIDH bounty ops home - rounds, judging pages, brand kits, and the leaderboard. Round 3 (the ZABAL Gamez best-ad bounty) runs here.

projects.name: CoCConcertZ
projects.desc: A live virtual-concert platform and Farcaster Mini App for COC Concertz - artist portals, admin show controls, live chat, recaps, and fan galleries.

projects.name: zlank
projects.desc: A no-code Farcaster Snap builder - stack blocks, hit Deploy, share a feed-native interactive Snap. Eleven block types, live preview, partner templates.

projects.name: fishbowlz
projects.desc: Persistent audio rooms with hot-seat rotation, live transcripts, speaker roles, token gating, and tipping - Farcaster-native conversations across multiple topics.

projects.name: nouns-snap
projects.desc: A finished example Snap that browses Nouns DAO NFTs - shows a Noun by id with image, owner, and the live auction.

projects.name: duodo-snap
projects.desc: A finished example Snap built for the Duo Do music fundraiser - goal tracker, music nav, event info, mobile-polished.

projects.name: zabalsnap1
projects.desc: A finished example Snap - a ZABAL token tracker with burn tracker, live price, balance checker, leaderboard, and share.

projects.name: ltaesnap
projects.desc: A finished example Snap for the Let The Artist Eat podcast - episode cards, host profiles, and an origin-story page.

projects.name: ZAOVideoEditor
projects.desc: A local-first video editor for conversation content (podcasts, livestreams, calls) - AI transcription, burned captions, and YouTube metadata generation.

projects.name: zaomusicbot
projects.desc: A Discord music bot (Lavalink + discord.js) with lofi and radio commands and a web UI.

projects.name: zaostock
projects.desc: The dashboard and public site for ZAOstock 2026, an artist-built festival in Ellsworth, Maine - team login, volunteer signup, working circles, and the day-of schedule.

projects.name: ZAOfractal
projects.desc: The governance documentation and research hub for ZAO Fractal - the weekly Respect Game on Optimism running since August 2024. Astro site with whitepaper chapters and a week counter.

projects.name: fractalbot
projects.desc: The Fractal Respect Game bot - voting flows, onchain Respect token submission to Optimism, and Snapshot integration.

projects.name: /zabal mini app
projects.desc: The Farcaster Mini App you are on - the ZABAL Gamez season hub: workshop schedule, join counter, activity backend, and submission board. The highest-leverage build to extend.

projects.name: zabalartsubmission
projects.desc: ZABAL Live Hub - a Farcaster mini app for community voting on live-stream direction (Studio / Market / Social / Battle), with a leaderboard.

projects.name: bcz-yapz
projects.desc: The BCZ YapZ long-form interview show site - searchable episode archive with transcripts, YouTube chapters, and topic tags.

projects.name: farscout
projects.desc: An autonomous Farcaster research scout - reads casts and channels, triages for novelty, grounds findings in multiple sources, and delivers via Discord slash commands.

projects.name: ZAOcowork
projects.desc: A task tracker (Supabase) with a Telegram bot and a Next.js Kanban web UI, plus an autonomous research-dispatch pipeline. Cross-source writes by UUID.

projects.name: hermes-orchestrator
projects.desc: A supervisor framework for agentic systems - classify a task, spawn an agent, watch its streaming output, intervene, and learn. Pluggable runner/memory/pattern adapters.

projects.name: WARZAI
projects.desc: A WaveWarZ AI agent (ElizaOS) with Solana onchain integration.

projects.name: Aurdour
projects.desc: A browser-based two-deck DJ platform with real-time mixing, effects, and a Flow Mode auto-DJ for non-DJs.

projects.name: Zuke
projects.desc: A white-label live audio-rooms surface for Farcaster communities - create and join spaces, listener badges, webhook sync, and admin auth. Built for the idea of running several topic rooms at once to bring people together.

projects.name: zaoprojects
projects.desc: A ZAO ecosystem progress-timeline dashboard (early v0.1) wired to a data source.

groups.name: Early-stage
groups.label: starters
groups.note: Scaffolds and templates ready to fork.

projects.name: ZAO 101
projects.desc: A static onboarding guide to The ZAO (home, pillars, join, FAQ) - scaffolded with placeholder copy, the smallest scope on this list.

projects.name: ZOUNZ
projects.desc: A Farcaster music NFT mini app (MVP) - browse and create collections, mint on Base, share to feed. Stubs in place for mint.club, not yet deployed.

projects.name: ZAOFlights
projects.desc: A conversational flight-search scaffold (Next.js, chat + results split) - a single initial commit, wide open for a builder to own.

projects.name: zlank-snap-template
projects.desc: A starter template for building Farcaster Snaps by hand - Hono + Vercel + the Farcaster Snap SDK, multi-page with form, state, and share patterns.

groups.name: Concept
groups.label: to build
groups.note: Specced and open for a builder to pick up — start from the rails, ship in the open.

projects.name: A new ZOE skill
projects.desc: Extend the ZOE concierge bot (Telegram). The backend mirrors the Hermes runtime - a Claude Code CLI subprocess with a swapped system prompt.

projects.name: WaveWarZ-Base Finals settlement
projects.desc: Wire the WaveWarZ-Base contracts into the Finals page - read live battle state, render a trade view per finalist, show the settlement readout at T+72h. Pairs with Sam's contract work.

projects.name: Songjam leaderboard migration
projects.desc: Move the Songjam leaderboard off the deprecated X scraper onto an Empire Builder leaderboard, so it runs on Farcaster-native data and frees the maintainer.

projects.name: POIDH bounty leaderboard
projects.desc: An Empire Builder leaderboard that counts unique POIDH bounty submitters across all ZABAL bounties, replacing manual per-submitter outreach.

projects.name: COC Concertz content pipeline
projects.desc: Automate the COC Concertz cross-post end: take the Descript export and YouTube description and fan it out to the social platforms via the ZAO publishing module.

projects.name: Concert discovery + calendar
projects.desc: A lighter, separate build idea: surface concert events for the ZAO music community - filter by date/genre/venue, export to calendar, cast to Farcaster.

projects.name: zlank Empire daily-stats Snap
projects.desc: A one-click 'Today's Empire Builder stats' Snap template on zlank. A kmac.eth + Zaal collab; the Footy app is the reference.

projects.name: ZAO Snaps tab on zlank
projects.desc: A curated tab of pre-built Snap templates for ZAO use cases, tracked in zlank Issue 64.

projects.name: Twitch to Empire Builder feed
projects.desc: Feed StreamElements WebSocket events from a live Twitch stream into an Empire Builder leaderboard, so stream activity becomes a real-time leaderboard for any creator.

projects.name: Streaming auto-clip flywheel
projects.desc: Turn hours of stream into short clips for TikTok, Reels, Shorts, and Farcaster - the content engine for ZABAL Gamez and every future ZAO event. Builds on ZAOVideoEditor.

projects.name: ZABAL Gamez judging system
projects.desc: The July judging rail. Signup links a wallet or Farcaster identity to a GitHub account (multiple accounts OK). A skill file pushes a builder's work to GitHub with their wallet in an MD file and makes one call to a register server that keeps a wallet-to-repo map; a cron turns new commits into Bonfire episodes scored by value to the ZAO ecosystem. Rolling admission, built in public.

projects.name: Knowledge-game report scorer
projects.desc: The July knowledge game. Builders write reports (Markdown) to GitHub about the ZAO ecosystem; reports are indexed into the Bonfire graph; the agent's daily summary cites the reports it drew from. The score is citations - whose reports get used most. Pairs with the judging system (#45) and seeds the graph the agent runs on.
